canonical_definition: Standardized BLEU score implementation for evaluating machine translation output by comparing n-gram overlap between model output and reference translations.
papers: Can Large Language Models be Effective Online Opinion Miners?
Reasoning-to-Defend: Safety-Aware Reasoning Can Defend Large Language Models from Jailbreaking
